modelStatusNoTrace: Returns honest capability/configuration status without claiming the last answer used a model.
modelStatusWithTrace: Reports recorded model usage for the last non-trace answer.
fallbackWording: Offers general recommendation, Nexus build plan, business/credit/funding angle, or Ray Review draft.
priority: Safety and trace/model status remain first; Nexus/general project planning precede fallback; explicit execution remains gated.

browser.detail: The application requires authenticated admin sign-in; no credentials were used or exposed.
